hero.title: Ukufikeleleka
hero.lead: I-IATF ijonge ukugcina le webhusayithi ilula, ifundeka, ifikeleleka ngekhibhodi, kwaye ihambelana neetekhnoloji ezincedisayo.
support: Ukufikeleleka kwiWebhu, i-IATF isebenzisa [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Ukufikeleleka okusebenzayo kukwaxhaswa ngamava ngqo abasebenzisi beetekhnoloji ezincedisayo.

paragraphs: Ukuba ufumana umqobo wokufikeleleka kule webhusayithi, nceda uxele nge-imeyile:
items: iphepha apho le ngxaki yenzeke khona
yeyiphi iteknoloji yokuncedisa, isikhangeli okanye isixhobo osisebenzisayo, ukuba kufanelekile
report.footnote: Akunyanzelekanga ukuba ubhale ingxelo yesiphene esemthethweni. Inkcazo ecacileyo yanele.

paragraphs: Imiba yokufikeleleka ingashwankathelwa kwindawo yokugcina yoluntu ukuze ilungiswe kwindawo evulekileyo. Iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano zobuqu kunye nolwazi oluyimfihlo olungeyomfuneko luyasuswa ngaphambi kokupapashwa.
Ukuba ingxelo yakho iquka inkcazelo yobuqu, yitsho ngokucacileyo kuloo myalezo.
Le webhsayithi incinane ngamabomu yaye inkoliso yayo ayiguquguquki. Ezinye iinguqulelo zeelwimi zisenokungaphelelanga ngoxa kulungiselelwa ukuguqulelwa.
